overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot from Cyberpunk 2077 rotating around a futuristic neon-lit city plaza at night. Massive holographic koi fish swim around the skyscrapers while sparse traffic moves along the multi-level roads below.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic displays

agents.ego_description: circling the plaza in a slow clockwise drone rotation, observing the holographic koi fish and city traffic from an elevated perspective

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the elevated highway ramp below

entered.detail: multi-level circular plaza with walkways and greenery in the center of the intersection
giant translucent blue holographic fish swimming along the building facades
giant translucent orange-red holographic fish swimming opposite to the blue fish
tall skyscraper with illuminated vertical lines dominating the background
cluster of bright neon signs and advertisements on the left side buildings
curved elevated road with moving traffic lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a front-facing view of the futuristic cyberpunk plaza, dominated by a central glass tower and two massive holographic koi fish swimming on either side. The camera rotates clockwise around the plaza, revealing neon billboards and an elevated highway ramp with sparse traffic moving below.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic displays

events.description: holographic blue and orange koi fish cross paths in the center of the plaza view

agents.ego_description: continuing the clockwise rotation around the plaza, now viewing the right side of the city block

entered.detail: rear face of the central building complex with different architectural details
tall vertical neon signs running up the right-side skyscrapers
narrow gap between tall buildings showing the city depth

segments.scene_description: As the camera rotates to the right side of the plaza, the holographic fish cross paths and swap sides of the frame. The central glass tower moves out of view, replaced by the rear building facades and vertical neon signage on the right-side skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic displays

agents.ego_description: continuing the clockwise rotation, now viewing the back side of the plaza and surrounding structures

entered.detail: rear face of the main central tower with illuminated structural elements
pedestrian walkway connecting buildings at the second level
circular landing pad on top of the central plaza structure

segments.scene_description: The camera continues rotating to show the back side of the plaza, revealing the rear of the central tower and an elevated walkway. The holographic fish continue their circular path, now positioned on the right and left sides respectively as they swim toward the front again.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic displays

events.description: holographic fish return to their original starting positions on left and right sides

agents.ego_description: completing the clockwise rotation around the plaza, returning to the initial front-facing perspective

notable_agents.action: futuristic vehicle driving along the main road passing under the plaza

entered.detail: front-facing facades of the main buildings returning to view
road bridge passing directly beneath the circular plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its rotation, returning to the front view of the plaza. The holographic koi fish swim back to their original positions on the left and right sides. The front facades of the buildings come back into view, and a vehicle passes beneath the plaza on the traffic bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise rotation around a futuristic cyberpunk plaza, beginning and ending with a front-facing view of a central glass tower. It begins by gliding past two massive holographic koi fish swimming beside the tower, revealing neon billboards and an elevated highway ramp with sparse traffic below. As the camera pivots to the right, the holographic fish cross paths and swap sides of the frame while the central tower gives way to the vertical neon signage of rear building facades. The movement continues toward the back of the plaza to reveal an elevated walkway and the rear of the central tower, with the koi fish continuing their circular orbit. Finally, the camera completes its rotation to return to the original front view, where the fish settle back into their starting positions as a vehicle passes beneath the plaza on the traffic bridge.
